legend.title: What these metrics mean
legend.leads: Absolute count of every record in the Leads table. Snapshot, not filtered by date or source.
legend.clientsDirect: Clients whose linked `source` primary name is one of the Ariete sources (Capital, Meta ads, Website). Snapshot.
legend.clientsFromAgents: Clients whose linked `source` is NOT one of the Ariete sources — i.e. introduced by external agents. Snapshot.
legend.clientsAll: Every record in the Clients table, regardless of source. Snapshot.
legend.spend: Total ad spend on Meta during the selected period.
legend.metaLeads: Lead form submissions reported by Meta Ads in the period (any of: lead, leadgen.other, fb_pixel_lead, onsite_conversion.lead_grouped).
legend.cpl: Cost per Lead = Spend ÷ Meta leads in period. Lower is better, so the delta is inverted.
legend.cac: Customer Acquisition Cost = Spend ÷ Closed clients (Ariete) introduced in period. Lower is better. Set a target in Setup to see at-a-glance whether you are on or over target.
legend.cohortNote: Period KPIs (Spend, Meta leads, CPL, CAC) refer to the selected date range. Snapshot KPIs above are absolute and ignore the date range.

trend.title: Daily spend & leads
trend.description: Meta Ads daily breakdown for the selected period.
trend.noData: No data for the selected period.

calendar.title: Booked Calls
calendar.description: Calls booked on Calendly in the selected period.

leads.title: Leads Pipeline
leads.description: Leads grouped by phase. Current snapshot, not date-filtered.

phases.title: Client Pipeline
phases.description: Clients grouped by phase. Current snapshot, not date-filtered.

funnel.title: Funnel
funnel.description: End-to-end conversion from Meta lead to investment executed for the selected period. Airtable stages are Ariete-source filtered.

cohorts.title: Cohort CAC
cohorts.description: Each row is the cohort of Ariete-sourced leads + clients introduced in that month. Spend is the Meta spend in the same month. Realized CAC = month spend ÷ closed clients from the cohort.
cohorts.maturationNote: Recent cohorts will look expensive — they have not had time to mature through the sales cycle. Use the older rows to read the steady-state CAC. If a Target CAC is set in Setup, realized CAC is colored green when ≤ target, red when over.

targetCac.title: Target CAC
targetCac.description: Reference Customer Acquisition Cost used to compare the actual CAC on the dashboard.
targetCac.label: Target CAC
targetCac.hint: Leave empty to remove the target. CAC = Spend ÷ Closed clients (Ariete) in the selected period.
